title: Charbon+ et Gaz
description: A mod that adds new types of coal, gas, hydrocarbons, and industrial machinery.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YQAAbUdAw0o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_For crafting recipes, you can use **JEI**_
_And for pipes and item transport, use the **Create mod**_


The flammable gas block can be ignited with a flint and steel, if there are enough gas blocks, it may explode.

# **Info :**
## **Generation :**

**Peat** : Y : 59 à 65, Bi : Swamp

  **Lignite** : Y : 43 à 57, Bi : Swamp, forest, dark forest, bitch forest, river, flower forest
  
  **Sub-bituminous coal** : Y : 29 à 48, Bi : Windswept gravelly hills, forest, forest, dark, plains, bitch forest
  
  **Anthracite** : Y : 10 à 30, Bi : Windswept gravelly hills, Windswept hills, snowy plains, snow slopes, snowy taiga
  
  **Gasified shale** : Y : -10 à -5, Bi : Everywhere
  
  **Gas vein** : Y : -35 à -5, Bi : Everywhere, 90% empty

  If it's open, mining it a second time closes the vein. To destroy the vein, you must mine it while holding down the "shift" key.

## **Useful block :**
**Dry peat**: place a block of raw peat then wait a little.

**Plant/Animal Bio-waste**: generates a little gas (the plant a little less) then becomes
a block of **bio-waste** which can be transformed into bone meal.

**Grid and Half-grid**: solid block and slab that lets gas blocks pass through

**Explosive Gas Charge**: Explodes a little harder than TNT, only activated by redstone

**Gas**: block that moves upwards, can catch fire if it touches fire or is activated with a flint and steel, (blocks them flaming or 1/30 exploded)

**Dry Peat**: Leather 3 items

**Lignite Block**: leather 17 item

**Coal Block**: Leather 55 item

**Anthracite Block**: leather 110 item

**Open Gas Vein**: Generates gas and then closes. Generates more gas and lasts longer if one vein is over another.

**Activated Carbon Block** : Absorbs gases that come into contact with a certain percentage

**Pollution level calculator**: indicates the level of pollution (negative effects begin to appear if it is too high)

## **Other block :**
**Peat wall**: decorative block

**Small peat wall**: decorative block

**Empty gas vein**: no use

**Charcoal Burner Table** : Profession block for charcoal burners.

## **Villager :** 

**Charcoal Burner** : Villager profession.

## **Item :** 

**Peat Bricks**: Leather 1 item

**Lignite**: leather 4 items

**sub-bituminous coal**: leather 6 item

**Anthracite**: leather 12 item

**Gas Bottle**: leather 9 item

**Coke Preparation**: Craft 6 Lignite or 4 Sub-bituminous Coal or 3 Coal or 2 Anthracite

**Coke** : leather 20 item

**Activated Carbon Preparation** : Craft with a Coke and a bucket of water

**Activated Carbon** : Used to craft filters

**Activated Carbon Bowl** : Used for the activated carbon mask

## **Equipment :**

**Activated Carbon Mask** : If equipped, prevents the gas from causing damage but wears out.

## **Generator :**
**Gas pump**: recovers gas for use, (can be extracted from the block with the pipes of other modes)

**Generator Controller**: Generates energy _(FE)_ from water and gas. You need a Gas power supply and another Water supply (if there are several of the same type they will not be counted), with a crouching click you can modify the maximum power. (30,000FE/s at 100%)

**Gas Supply Generator**: gas supply for the generator, filled with the hoses from other modes or if a gas pump is just below the block.

**Generator Water Supply**: water supply for the generator, filled with the pipes from other modes or if a gas pump is just below the block which is itself on a water source.

**Small coal kiln** : if a fire block is above it, it activates after burning and releases charcoal once destroyed.

**Large charcoal kiln** : When a bundle of wood is surrounded by Mud wall side
(top and side), the upper wall becomes different. If a click with a flint and stael, it makes smoke after being finished, it releases charcoal after being destroyed.

_English translation may be inaccurate !_
